title: For Love or Money
writer: Anthony Gibbs, Dorothy Greenhill, Arthur Wimperis
actors: Edmund Gwenn, Wendy Barrie, Robert Donat
plot: A schemer and his daughter have lived the high life, but they are out of cash. A last-ditch plan to lure investors goes awry when the electric company shows up to turn off the lights. But the new employee brings hope and something...
